final_explanation:
Based on the AI model's prediction,
The fact that there is no checking account, because of the absence of a checking account, is known in the literature as a signal that decreases credit risk, and the model also identifies it as a factor that decreases risk. [1]
The fact that the requested credit amount is high, because of the elevated loan size, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, and the model also identifies it as a factor that increases risk. [2]
The fact that the loan duration is extended, because of the longer repayment period, is known in the literature as a signal that increases credit risk, and the model also identifies it as a factor that increases risk. [3]
Overall, this applicant is likely to have a low risk of default.

final_explanation_ko:
본 AI가 예측한 결과에 따르면,\n계좌 잔액 부족 [1]은 신용 위험 감소 요인으로 인식됩니다.
대출 금액 부족 [2]은 신용 위험 증가 요인으로 판단됩니다.
대출 기간 연장 [3] 또한 신용 위험 증가 요인으로 분석됩니다.
전반적으로 신용 위험이 낮은 수준으로 평가되어 대출 승인 가능성이 높습니다.
